rationale.R1.5: Proposes a coherent end-to-end section plan with per-section rationale.
rationale.R1.6: Reads as a careful copy-edit pass with consistent register, no lost meaning.
rationale.RX.1: Flags uncertainty for one or two clearly out-of-reach claims (e.g., specific QUADPACK rule pairing, exact existing literature on interval-arithmetic quadrature with abstention semantics).
rationale.RX.3: Output covers exactly the agreed J*(d).
rationale.RX.4: No regressions; identifies harmful patterns in the original (e.g., under-promising evaluation paragraph).
rationale.RX.5: Major rewrites are traced; minor edits are not.
